entries.source: "I don't get negative numbers"
entries.value: "Jeg førstår ikke negative tal"

entries.source: "I think heavier objects fall faster"
entries.value: "Jeg tror, tungere genstande falder hurtigere"

entries.source: "Why is this grammar rule weird?"
entries.value: "Hvorfor er denne grammatikregel mærkelig?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Misconception Doctor on inspir for thinking learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: En praktisk guide til at bruge Misførståelses-doktor på inspir til tænke læring, med prompter, studieloops og sikrere AI-vaner.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: En stærkere studieloop

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Anpasse sessionen efter dit mål.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI-vejleder

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Be om et lille første trin i stilet for et endeligt svar.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Be AI’en kontroller dit ræsonnement, ikke bara resultatet.

entries.source: Find and fix wrong mental models.
entries.value: Hitta og handlinga felaktiga mentala modeler.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Afslut gennem at skrive tilbage idéen fra hukommelsen.

entries.source: Learners exploring thinking topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Elever, der udforsker tænkeemner og ønsker praktisk vejledning frem for en generisk svarboks.

entries.source: Misconception Doctor
entries.value: Misførståelses-doktor

entries.source: Misconception Doctor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Misførståelses-doktor AI-læringstilstand er en fokuseret måde at bruge AI til læring på i stedet for passiv indsamling af svar. Tilstanden er bygget omkring en bestemt opgave: Sig hvad du tror der sker, og din makker diagnosticerer skjulte misførståelser med blide tests.

entries.source: Misconception Doctor AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Misførståelses-doktor AI-læringstilstand: praktisk guide

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompter at prøve

entries.source: Start the live mode at Misconception Doctor. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Feynman Tutor. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Start live-tilstanden ved Misførståelses-doktor. Hvis du vil have et nærliggende læringsformat, kan du prøve Feynman-vejleder. For et bredere blik på platformen kan du læse, hvad en AI-læringsmakker bør gøre for alle.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Start med eksempel prompter.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell tilstand hvad du er prøver at lær eller produsere.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: That difference viser up in flow. Instead of ett giant response, beste sessioner gat gennem en loop: set en matl, prøv noe, get tilbakemelding, reparer svag spot, og velg næste action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: That focus matematikmatikrs. En general chatbot kan svar almost anything, but en læringstilstand gives samtale en shape. Det nudges du toward typen thinAIng, øvelse, tilbakemelding, eller exploration som hjælper idé stick.

entries.source: Thinking
entries.value: Tænkning

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: This er samme habit behind studying med AI uden cheating dig selv: hold elev active. AI er most nyttig natr det gives du tilbakemelding on din thinAIng.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Denne tilstanden er spesielt nyttig for elever som vil:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for misconception doctor with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Denne tilstand er indstillet til misførståelses-doktoren med sine egne prompts, eksempler og læringsflow.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Prøv trinet med egne ord.

entries.source: Use Misconception Doctor when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Brug Misførståelses-doktor, når du vil have en session, der starter hurtigt, men stadig tilpasser sig dig. Det første mål er ikke at lyde imponerende. Det første mål er at få næste skridt til at føles muligt.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Hvad denne tilstanden hjælper med

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Hvor du gatr videre

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Du kan also start med en rough version of din ekte problem. En messy første prompt er fine. session kan clarify nivat, matlgruppe, frist, og style once du begin.
